intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

compositional_truth_check.reconciliation_notes: The biome has suffered a total collapse of all biological specimens. The registry-defined plants (P1, P2, P3, P4) are no longer present in any viable form.

inventory_reconciliation.P3_Pothos: Systemic Loss (Anchor rabbit present, plant absent)

plant_audit.P1: Empty yellow pot; no organic matter detected.
plant_audit.P2: Empty black pot; no organic matter detected.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor remains, but the Pothos specimen has been removed or disintegrated.
plant_audit.P4: Empty black pot; no organic matter detected.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Desiccated, dark, and devoid of life.
biome_observations.surface_debris: Residual eggshell fragments remain in the black pot, serving as the only non-soil matter.
biome_observations.desk_environment: Clean, no signs of recent biological activity or maintenance.

temporal_deltas.EARLIEST_to_T-2: Initial state shows a single green leaf/stem in the black pot and a white rabbit anchor in the P3 pot.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Total disappearance of all plant matter. The environment has transitioned to a sterile, empty state.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-functional. All specimens have been lost, likely due to total desiccation or physical removal.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of eggshell fragments suggests a previous attempt at soil amendment or pest control, but the current state is entirely devoid of plant life.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic loss of the botanical collection. Starting from the earliest image, a single specimen was visible in the black pot. By the final images, this specimen has vanished, leaving only the white rabbit anchor and empty soil. The biome is now completely dormant and sterile.
